description.en: Out-of-range values are kept, and the Flag membership is kept. This is the default for IntFlag: >>> from enum import Flag, KEEP, auto >>> class KeepFlag(Flag, boundary=KEEP): ... RED = auto() ... GREEN = auto() ... BLUE = auto() ... >>> KeepFlag(2**2 + 2**4) <KeepFlag.BLUE|16: 20>

excerpt.es: Out-of-range values are kept, and the Flag membership is kept. This is the default for IntFlag: >>> from enum import Flag, KEEP, auto >>> class KeepFlag(Flag, boundary=KEEP): ... RED = auto() ... GREE...
excerpt.en: Out-of-range values are kept, and the Flag membership is kept. This is the default for IntFlag: >>> from enum import Flag, KEEP, auto >>> class KeepFlag(Flag, boundary=KEEP): ... RED = auto() ... GREE...
